title: College Loan Payback Calculator
description: Interactive simulation helping students calculate repayment time for college loans based on years in school, tuition costs, interest rates, and monthly payments.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Student Loans
College Costs
Loan Repayment
Personal Finance
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of college loan payback calculator
Explore college loan payback calculator through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of college loan payback calculator to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on college loan payback calculator
